schema_version: Internal schema version marker, not an operator lever. Shown implicitly by the panel working at all; a version the panel cannot read would fail to load.
state_dir: Structural path to the durable-state directory, always .modonome in practice. Not something an operator changes per session.
providers: Advanced provider-registry override (transport, cost class, auth env var per provider). Rare, expert-only edit. Extend Settings > Roles & models with a Providers table if this becomes a common need; until then, edit config.yaml directly.
